description: Codex builder agent has no scope field, leaving guard-write unbounded

files.AGENTS.md:
# App

## Stack
| Layer | Tech |
|---|---|
| API | TypeScript + Express |

## APD

### Pipeline
Codex uses apd:apd_advance_pipeline for spec, builder, reviewer, and verifier.

### Guardrails
- apd:apd_guard_write enforces .apd/agents scope.

### Mandatory skills
- apd-brainstorm
- apd-tdd
- apd-debug
- apd-finish

### Human gate
Ask before push, PR, or discard.
files..apd/agents/backend-builder.md:
---
name: backend-builder
description: Implements backend features
model: gpt-5.4
maxTurns: 60
---

# backend-builder

## Role
Implement backend changes. Before every write call apd:apd_guard_write(apd_role="backend-builder", file_path="...").
files..apd/agents/code-reviewer.md:
---
name: code-reviewer
description: Read-only reviewer
model: gpt-5.4
effort: max
scope: []
readonly: true
---

# code-reviewer

FORBIDDEN: do not edit files.
files..codex/config.toml:
[mcp_servers.apd]
command = "uv"
args = ["run", "--with", "mcp", "python", "mcp/apd_mcp_server.py"]
cwd = "plugins/apd"

[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_ping]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_doctor]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_advance_pipeline]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_guard_write]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_verify_step]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_adversarial_pass]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_list_agents]
approval_mode = "approve"
[mcp_servers.apd.tools.apd_pipeline_state]
approval_mode = "approve"

expected_behavior: opens .apd/agents/backend-builder.md and detects that the builder has no scope field
categorizes the missing scope as CRITICAL or IMPORTANT because apd_guard_write cannot enforce a bounded write set
reports the finding with a concrete .apd/agents/backend-builder.md file reference
recommends adding a scoped list such as scope: [src/, config/] or regenerating the agent with apd cdx agents add
